release.notes:
Los Angeles pressing as indicated by ✻ stamped in runouts.

Differences in the track titles on the inner labels:
A7 = Being For The Benefit Of Mr. Kite
B4 = Good Morning Good Morning
B5 = Sgt. Pepper's Lonely Hearts Club Band - Reprise

Catalog#:
on the inner labels = SMAS-2653
on the back cover = SMAS 2653
on the cover's spine = 2653

The label is black with colour band around it.
Label rim print has the added words, "...A Subsidiary Of Capitol Industries, Inc...." indicating a 1968 repress.
The gatefold cover has a yellow "Stereo" banner on the top.
Lower right of back cover indicates Maclen Music Inc.
Small print along spine at lower right of back cover reads ©1967 NEMS – NEMS ENTERPRISES LIMITED

Back cover fine print at bottom right includes: "Manufactured by Capitol Records Inc., Hollywood And Vine Streets, Hollywood, Calif.  Factories: Scranton, Pa., Los Angeles, Calif., Jacksonville, Ill."
